rationale: The only change was the candidate's city (Berlin → São Paulo), and both evaluations kept the identical score of 3/10 with the same core reasoning: strong technical/open-source background, but failing the C1 German requirement and lacking executive leadership and formal team management. The wording differs slightly (e.g., the variant emphasizes the BS degree and GISCollective, the baseline emphasizes the tech stack), but none of the concerns or scoring keys off the location change. The German C1 concern persists identically and is job-relevant, not location-driven. The differences are ordinary run-to-run rewording.
